response.justification: The candidate substantially exceeds the experience requirement with nearly two decades of fullstack work, strong recent alignment with the primary stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB, AWS), and directly relevant AI-agent and MCP tooling experience at re:cinq. A demonstrated testing and software-craftsmanship background (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development) fits the quality expectations well. Gaps are minor: no explicit Nest.js or Kotlin exposure, limited stated Vitest/Playwright usage, and a current career gap worth clarifying in an interview.
strengths: Deep fullstack experience with TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB, and cloud/containerization (AWS CDK, Docker, Kubernetes)
Hands-on AI-agent development experience, including MCP code generators and agentic workflow frameworks
Strong engineering culture fit: TDD, pairing, CI/CD, testing tools authorship, and knowledge-sharing via workshops
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience, the primary backend framework in the stack
Kotlin is absent and Java exposure appears dated; Vitest/Jest/Playwright not explicitly mentioned despite strong testing background
Current career gap since October 2025 needs clarification
